NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE OF DEFENDANT RITA TOMPKINS TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF BALWANT THAKOR, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT AS TO DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA T. PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-11-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
